---
title: "01_assembly"
author: "Darius Huisman"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

## Step 2. Assembly

Make a directory called flye.
```bash
mkdir flye
```

Into flye, make a symbolic link to the bbd read data
```bash
ln -s /pvol/data/metagenome_assembly/bbd_0.1.fastq.gz .
```

Make a new she
ll script called run_flye_bbd.sh and save it inside your flye directory
```bash
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --time=720
#SBATCH --ntasks=12 --mem=10gb

echo "Starting flye bbd in $(pwd) at $(date)"

flye --nano-hq ../Workshop4_marine_genomics/flye/bbd_0.1.fastq.gz --threads 12 --out-dir bbd --meta

echo "Finished flye bbd in $(pwd) at $(date)"
```

Submit job
```bash
sbatch run_flye_bbd.sh
```
